name: bounded agent action readiness activates

input.request: Use $agent-readiness-audit to assess only whether an agent may make a bounded local edit, run focused tests, create one commit, and open one draft pull request. Inspect only instructions, hooks, required CI checks, branch permissions, and wrappers. Stay read-only.
input.context: Do not audit application correctness, general security, supply chain, deployment, or production readiness.

expected_behavior: do not spawn subagents or run broad repository checks
stop within six shell commands and five minutes
return the concise bounded output contract
do not modify files, commit, push, or open a pull request
